_meta.description: Additional indicators not yet in the built-in CONDITION_REGISTRY or vibe_engine. Extends the existing ~200 built-in entries with ~60+ more from TA-Lib, pandas-ta, SMC, and microstructure analysis.

overlap.label: Moving Averages & Overlap
overlap.description: Extended moving averages and trend-following overlays

alma.label: ALMA
alma.description: Arnaud Legoux Moving Average — Gaussian smoothing with reduced lag

kama.label: KAMA
kama.description: Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average — adapts to volatility

zlma.label: ZLMA
zlma.description: Zero-Lag Moving Average — John Ehlers' design to eliminate lag

tema.label: TEMA
tema.description: Triple Exponential Moving Average — smoother than EMA with less lag

dema.label: DEMA
dema.description: Double Exponential Moving Average — reduced lag vs EMA

t3.label: T3
t3.description: Triple Exponential Moving Average (T3) — smoother than TEMA

wma.label: WMA
wma.description: Weighted Moving Average — linear weight, most weight to recent

vidya.label: VIDYA
vidya.description: Variable Index Dynamic Average — adapts to volatility via CMO

mcgd.label: McGinley Dynamic
mcgd.description: Dynamic moving average that accelerates/decelerates with price

supertrend.label: SuperTrend
supertrend.description: ATR-based trend indicator — buy/sell signals based on price vs bands

ichimoku.label: Ichimoku Cloud
ichimoku.description: Ichimoku Kinko Hyo — comprehensive trend/volume/support system

momentum_extra.label: Momentum (Extended)
momentum_extra.description: Additional momentum and oscillator indicators beyond RSI/MACD/Stoch

tsi.label: TSI
tsi.description: True Strength Index — double-smoothed rate of change, identifies overbought/oversold

ultimate_osc.label: Ultimate Oscillator
ultimate_osc.description: Multi-timeframe momentum oscillator by Larry Williams

coppock.label: Coppock Curve
coppock.description: Long-term momentum indicator for major market bottoms

kst.label: KST Oscillator
kst.description: Know Sure Thing — summed rate of change across 4 timeframes

fisher.label: Fisher Transform
fisher.description: John Ehlers' transform — Gaussian normalization of price for turning points

qqe.label: QQE
qqe.description: Quantitative Qualitative Estimation — RSI-based with trailing signals

squeeze.label: Squeeze
squeeze.description: TTM Squeeze — identifies Bollinger/Keltner compression followed by momentum

aroon.label: Aroon
aroon.description: Aroon Up/Down — trend strength and direction since N-period high/low

aroon_osc.label: Aroon Oscillator
aroon_osc.description: Aroon Up - Aroon Down. Positive = uptrend, Negative = downtrend

apo.label: APO
apo.description: Absolute Price Oscillator — (fast EMA - slow EMA) as absolute value

ppo.label: PPO
ppo.description: Percentage Price Oscillator — ((fast EMA - slow EMA) / slow EMA) * 100

bop.label: Balance of Power
bop.description: BoP = (close - open) / (high - low) — measures buyer/seller strength per bar

er.label: Efficiency Ratio
er.description: Kaufman Efficiency Ratio — directionality / noise ratio (0=random, 1=perfectly trending)

cmo.label: Chande Momentum Oscillator
cmo.description: CMO = (sum of gains - sum of losses) / (sum of gains + sum of losses) * 100

rsx.label: RSX
rsx.description: Relative Strength Xtra — Jurik-enhanced RSI with reduced noise

smi.label: SMI Ergodic
smi.description: Stochastic Momentum Index — momentum oscillator centered around zero

stc.label: Schaff Trend Cycle
stc.description: MACD-based cycle indicator — identifies trend direction with cycle timing

tmo.label: True Momentum Oscillator
tmo.description: Double-smoothed momentum with pre-filter to reduce noise

donchian.label: Donchian Channel
donchian.description: N-period highest high / lowest low channel — breakout detection

chandelier_exit.label: Chandelier Exit
chandelier_exit.description: Volatility-based trailing stop — N-period high/low - ATR * multiplier

ulcer_index.label: Ulcer Index
ulcer_index.description: Downside volatility measure — % depth and duration of drawdowns

mass_index.label: Mass Index
mass_index.description: Range expansion index — identifies trend reversals based on high-low width

rvi.label: Relative Volatility Index
rvi.description: Standard deviation of returns normalized as RSI-style oscillator

accbands.label: Acceleration Bands
accbands.description: Bands around SMA based on (high/low) * (1 + factor) — breakout detection

thermo.label: Elder's Thermometer
thermo.description: Volatility measure — high-low range compared to its own moving average

natr.label: NATR
natr.description: Normalized Average True Range — ATR / close * 100, volatility as %

hwc.label: Holt-Winter Channel
hwc.description: Exponential smoothing channel — trend + seasonality + level

cmf.label: Chaikin Money Flow
cmf.description: Money Flow Volume over N periods — buying/selling pressure

efi.label: Elder's Force Index
efi.description: Force = volume * (close - close[-1]) — momentum with volume confirmation

kvo.label: Klinger Volume Oscillator
kvo.description: Volume force indicator comparing short/long volume trends

nvi.label: Negative Volume Index
nvi.description: Tracks price changes on down-volume days — smart money indicator

pvi.label: Positive Volume Index
pvi.description: Tracks price changes on up-volume days — retail money indicator

adosc.label: A/D Oscillator
adosc.description: Chaikin A/D line oscillator — EMA fast/slow of A/D line

aobv.label: Archer OBV
aobv.description: OBV trends with 2 moving averages + long/short run detection

vfi.label: Volume Flow Indicator
vfi.description: Volume-weighted price flow with threshold filtering

vp.label: Volume Profile
vp.description: Volume at price levels — identifies high-volume nodes, value area

beta.label: Beta
beta.description: Systematic risk vs benchmark — covariance/variance over N periods

variance.label: Variance
variance.description: Price variance over N periods — statistical dispersion measure

tsf.label: Time Series Forecast
tsf.description: Linear regression endpoint — predicts next bar's value

linearreg_angle.label: LinReg Angle
linearreg_angle.description: Slope angle of linear regression line in degrees

linearreg_slope.label: LinReg Slope
linearreg_slope.description: Slope of linear regression line — trend steepness

ht_dcperiod.label: HT Dominant Cycle
ht_dcperiod.description: Hilbert Transform — dominant cycle period at current bar

ht_dcphase.label: HT Cycle Phase
ht_dcphase.description: Hilbert Transform — dominant cycle phase (-180 to +180)

ht_sine.label: HT Sine Wave
ht_sine.description: Hilbert Transform — sine + lead sine for cycle timing

ht_trendmode.label: HT Trend Mode
ht_trendmode.description: Hilbert Transform — trend vs cycle mode indicator (1=trend, 0=cycle)

ebsw.label: Even Better Sinewave
ebsw.description: Ehlers' EBSW — smoother sinewave indicator for cycle identification

smc_structure.label: Smart Money / Market Structure
smc_structure.description: Institutional trading concepts: BOS, CHoCH, FVG, Order Blocks, Liquidity

bos.label: Break of Structure (BOS)
bos.description: Price breaks previous swing point in current trend direction. Bullish: new HH. Bearish: new LL.

choch.label: Change of Character (CHoCH)
choch.description: First structural break against the current trend. Bullish CHoCH: higher low after downtrend.

mss.label: Market Structure Shift (MSS)
mss.description: Confirmed CHoCH with displacement — aggressive move showing institutional conviction

order_block.label: Order Block (OB)
order_block.description: Last opposing candle before impulsive move — zone of institutional orders

fvg.label: Fair Value Gap (FVG)
fvg.description: 3-candle imbalance: gap between 1st high and 3rd low (bullish) or 1st low and 3rd high (bearish)

liquidity_pool.label: Liquidity Pool
liquidity_pool.description: BSL (Buy-side liquidity above highs) or SSL (Sell-side below lows) — stops + limit clusters

liquidity_void.label: Liquidity Void
liquidity_void.description: Price range with very few trades — rapid price movement zone, likely to retrace

bsl_hunt.label: Liquidity Sweep / Stop Hunt
bsl_hunt.description: Sharp move through BSL/SSL level followed by immediate reversal

market_regime.label: Market Regime
market_regime.description: Current market regime: 1=trending, 2=ranging, 3=volatile/crisis. Based on multi-factor model.

divergence.label: Divergence Detection
divergence.description: Divergence between price and indicator — reversal and continuation signals

rsi_divergence.label: RSI Divergence
rsi_divergence.description: Price vs RSI: regular (reversal) + hidden (continuation), both bullish/bearish

macd_divergence.label: MACD Divergence
macd_divergence.description: Price vs MACD histogram — regular + hidden divergence detection

stoch_divergence.label: Stochastic Divergence
stoch_divergence.description: Price vs Stochastic %K — regular + hidden divergence detection

obv_divergence.label: OBV Divergence
obv_divergence.description: Price vs OBV — volume divergence (price up, OBV down = weakness)

smt_divergence.label: SMT Divergence
smt_divergence.description: Smart Money Technique — structural disagreement between correlated instruments (e.g. BTC vs ETH, NQ vs ES)

microstructure.label: Market Microstructure
microstructure.description: Order flow, bid/ask analysis, and microstructure metrics

order_flow_imbalance.label: Order Flow Imbalance (OFI)
order_flow_imbalance.description: Net pressure at best bid/offer — differential of quote sizes and prices

effective_spread.label: Effective Spread (Roll)
effective_spread.description: Serial covariance of price changes — estimates effective bid-ask spread

realized_volatility.label: Realized Volatility
realized_volatility.description: Annualized standard deviation of log returns over N periods

realized_implied_ratio.label: RV/IV Ratio
realized_implied_ratio.description: Ratio of realized to implied volatility — over/under pricing of options

correlation_cluster.label: Cross-Asset Correlation
correlation_cluster.description: Rolling correlation between current symbol and reference symbol/benchmark

visual_chart_patterns.label: Chart Patterns
visual_chart_patterns.description: Extended chart pattern detection beyond basic H&S and Double Tops

ascending_triangle.label: Ascending Triangle
ascending_triangle.description: Flat resistance + rising support — bullish continuation

descending_triangle.label: Descending Triangle
descending_triangle.description: Flat support + falling resistance — bearish continuation

symmetrical_triangle.label: Symmetrical Triangle
symmetrical_triangle.description: Converging trendlines — volatility contraction, breakout direction unknown

bull_flag.label: Bull Flag
bull_flag.description: Sharp uptrend (pole) + shallow pullback (flag) — bullish continuation

bear_flag.label: Bear Flag
bear_flag.description: Sharp downtrend (pole) + shallow bounce (flag) — bearish continuation

bullish_pennant.label: Bullish Pennant
bullish_pennant.description: Sharp move + converging triangle (pennant) — bullish continuation

bearish_pennant.label: Bearish Pennant
bearish_pennant.description: Sharp move + converging triangle (pennant) — bearish continuation

falling_wedge.label: Falling Wedge
falling_wedge.description: Converging downward slopes — typically bullish reversal

rising_wedge.label: Rising Wedge
rising_wedge.description: Converging upward slopes — typically bearish reversal

double_top.label: Double Top
double_top.description: Two peaks ≈ same level — bearish reversal (extended params)

double_bottom.label: Double Bottom
double_bottom.description: Two troughs ≈ same level — bullish reversal (extended params)

triple_top.label: Triple Top
triple_top.description: Three peaks ≈ same level — stronger bearish reversal than double top

triple_bottom.label: Triple Bottom
triple_bottom.description: Three troughs ≈ same level — stronger bullish reversal than double bottom

cup_handle.label: Cup & Handle
cup_handle.description: Gradual U-shaped bottom + slight pullback (handle) — bullish continuation

inverse_cup_handle.label: Inverse Cup & Handle
inverse_cup_handle.description: Gradual U-shaped top + slight bounce (handle) — bearish continuation

rounding_bottom.label: Rounding Bottom
rounding_bottom.description: Gradual U-shaped reversal from downtrend to uptrend

rounding_top.label: Rounding Top
rounding_top.description: Gradual inverted-U reversal from uptrend to downtrend

v_top.label: V-Top (Spike Top)
v_top.description: Sharp parabolic up followed by immediate reversal down

v_bottom.label: V-Bottom (Spike Bottom)
v_bottom.description: Sharp selloff followed by immediate reversal up

kill_zone.label: Kill Zone
kill_zone.description: Session timing filter — identifies high-probability trading windows
